meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome can't debug code. A Advanced-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: Antigravity project template to Solve Debugging
content.seo_description: Master debugging with the Antigravity project template and Claude Code. A high-level checklist for students to build robust, error-free AI applications.
content.answer_block: Debugging paralysis stems from manual tracing. By deploying an Antigravity project template, you standardize your architecture, enabling Claude Code to perform automated root-cause analysis. This workflow shifts you from reactive 'print-statement' debugging to proactive, AI-driven architectural refinement, effectively eliminating complex runtime bottlenecks in your student projects.
content.intro:
The screen glows, the terminal spits out a wall of red text, and you’re stuck—again. You’ve spent hours hunting a bug that feels like a ghost in the machine, and your motivation is starting to wane. This is the crucible every great engineer faces when transitioning from 'writing code' to 'engineering systems.'

But the era of manual, agonizing debugging is over. By leveraging the Antigravity project template, you gain a structured, battle-hardened foundation that makes your codebase transparent to AI agents. It’s time to stop fighting your editor and start architecting solutions that scale.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Standardize your repository structure to ensure Claude Code can map your dependencies and logic flow instantly.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize an Antigravity project template with strict TypeScript configuration and modular architecture for a Next.js AI application.

steps.title: Map the Error Domain
steps.description: Isolate the failing module to prevent 'hallucinated' fixes by providing the AI with a bounded context.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current error log and map the dependency graph for the affected module to identify the root cause.

steps.title: Automated Trace Injection
steps.description: Use the template's built-in observability tools to surface hidden state transitions during runtime.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Inject structured logging into the asynchronous data flow to capture state snapshots before the crash.

steps.title: AI-Driven Refactoring
steps.description: Apply the fix while ensuring the code remains compliant with your established architectural patterns.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor the identified logic error while maintaining strict adherence to the project's dependency injection pattern.

steps.title: Validation and Regression Testing
steps.description: Ensure the fix is permanent by automating a test suite that covers the specific failure edge case.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a Jest test suite that specifically targets the previously identified runtime error for regression prevention.

pro_tips: Always use the '--dry-run' flag with Claude Code to preview architectural changes before applying them to your production template.
Map your project's 'mental model' in a README.md; Claude Code references this to maintain context across long-running sessions.
Use Antigravity's 'sandbox mode' to test API integrations in isolation, preventing rate-limit errors during the debugging phase.
Tag your commits with the specific 'Antigravity-ID' provided by the tool to track how your debugging fixes impact performance over time.
Configure your environment variables as strictly typed interfaces to force the compiler to catch configuration errors before runtime.
resources: Best Practices for AI Engineering: https://ai-builder-guide.io
content.next_steps: Once you have successfully debugged your first module, begin mapping your entire application state to the Antigravity dashboard to visualize bottlenecks in real-time.
content.conversion_block: You have the tools, the template, and the methodology to build software that actually works. Don't let a missing semicolon stop your career growth. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
